sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35422" key="e)nerghte/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεργ-ητέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35422.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be done,</tr_> dub. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0635.tlg001:1:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">ZenoStoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
